/usr/bin/c++ -g CMakeFiles/extreamfs.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/extreamfs.dir/src/core/Analyzer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/extreamfs.dir/src/disk/DiskManagement.cpp.o CMakeFiles/extreamfs.dir/src/disk/MountManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/extreamfs.dir/src/fs/FileSystemManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/extreamfs.dir/src/fs/SessionManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/extreamfs.dir/src/reports/ReportManager.cpp.o -o extreamfs
